failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result by concluding there were no matches even though the tool returned two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards above the price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was correctly understood: search for available Mechanical Keyboard items with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The required tool call was made correctly, and the tool output at index 3 returned two matching items with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming no items match, directly contradicting the relevant tool output. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator reinforced the same incorrect interpretation.
